quote_of_day.text: Bhai, society's already collapsing yaar, just look at the state of politics and economy, arre it's all going downhill fast. Mark my words, it's gonna be a wild ride, maybe 10-20 years max before things get really out of hand, bc it's already pretty messed up.
quote_of_day.name: Jaggu

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A toxic high pressure system of caste hatred dominated the board, bringing with it a torrent of violent rhetoric against low castes.

This oppressive front showed no signs of lifting, instead spawning a series of aggressive replies and justifications.

A scattered drizzle of livestream-death gossip persisted in the afternoon, with the tragic case of a 24-year-old erotic model in Italy sparking some discussion.

Nearby, a brief but intense squall of incel frustration blew in, as one anon sought advice on transforming into a 'Chad' in just two months.

Meanwhile, a cold snap of interfaith hostility swept through the board, with Buddhists being called 'dumb' and sparking a heated debate.

A related front of nationalist sentiment ran parallel, as some posters weighed in on the hypothetical scenario of Pakistan's dissolution and its potential impact on Indian patriotism.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Others Respond
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a list of violent actions against low castes, including beheading, acid attacks, and rape.

The post enumerated: 'Kill low castes Behead low castes Drop low castes in a vat of acid Throw low castes into meat grinder Use low castes as manure Rape low castes Drag low castes out into streets and set them on fire Gas low castes.' Another anon responded by blaming low castes for India's poverty and poor international reputation, stating they have 'ruined prestigious Indian institutions.' A different anon suggested that allowing low castes to use upper caste surnames could lead to them committing crimes and then blaming upper castes for their actions.

This anon described a scenario where 'Low caste proceeds to rape other LC >Blame it all on the UC for how LC act.' One respondent brought up a specific case of a dalit man accused of raping a 5-year-old, noting that the dalit man's name was similar to Bhimta Rao, a reference to B.R.

Ambedkar, a prominent dalit rights leader. This anon observed that the dalit man's own community and supporters abandoned him after the crime was exposed. Another poster argued that certain minority groups have made positive contributions to India, but low castes have not.

They listed various minority groups and their perceived contributions, such as Sikhs in the army and Muslims in science and culture. One anon discussed reservations, a system aimed at helping historically disadvantaged groups, including low castes.

This poster described people who use reservation as 'dysgenic persons' and expressed a desire for their 'total rejerbhation.' Anon also debated the formation of the Other Backward Classes (OBC) category and its implications.

One claimed that the creation of OBC, which includes some individuals from traditionally high-caste backgrounds who have fallen in status, was more problematic than the reservation of low castes.

The thread also included a discussion on genetics and caste, with one poster suggesting that the behavior of low castes can be explained by epigenetics and the consequences of inbreeding over generations.

This anon stated it is 'normal for one in every two dalit to be retarded, inbred' due to these factors.

articles.title: Erotic Model's Livestream Ends in Death
articles.body:
Anon described a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who died during a livestream in Italy, amid the COVID-19 pandemic. The model was talking about the latest news while a radio station played in the background.

Anon provided a case from a German Forensic Medicine textbook, where a 24-year-old man intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner in 2004.

Another anon shared a different incident involving a 23-year-old woman who was doing it with her male partner as a spotter, but he waited too long, leaving her hanging for a minute while he masturbated.

A separate case involved an 18-year-old man streaming on an erotic platform, where a viewer requested he masturbate while hanging himself in exchange for a donation. The viewer suggested using a bed sheet since the streamer didn't have a rope.

There was debate among those who saw the video about whether it was a suicide or an accidental death. Anon noted that some people get aroused by strange things, such as imagining being killed by hanging or strangulation.

They also mentioned that a brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect. One respondent shared that they have been watching gore since they were 13, but hanging videos make them uncomfortable.

Another case mentioned was of a 27-year-old man streaming on LiveJasmin while wearing a condom, who passed out and got strangled to death. His stream continued for 23 minutes after he died, before it was stopped.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation Advice
articles.body:
Anon asked how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One anon replied with a personal anecdote, stating they had sex with someone but were concerned about not making enough money to have kids.

Another anon suggested that using labels like 'randis' for promiscuous women was 'middle class' and that one should simply think of them as such to increase chances of 'banging one.' A different approach was proposed by an anon who advised getting a vasectomy, saying it's 'not worth having a nanhajeet in this economy.' Some anons provided more direct advice.

One simply told the OP to 'get fucked, incel' while another provided a bulleted list of actions: go to the gym, eat protein, sleep, grow a beard, get a haircut, stop fapping, bitching, whining, and being a 'fucking loser.' The conversation also touched on topics unrelated to the OP's question.

Anons discussed the differences between thongs and G-strings, with one explaining that G-strings are for women who want to show their ass.

Another anon asked for advice on how to interact with women without using 'cheap Hindi abuses' or acting like he knows they're promiscuous. The thread also included some personal attacks, with one anon calling another a 'fagyush' and 'fag.'

articles.title: Anon calls Buddhists 'dumb', sparks debate
articles.body:
Anon questioned the intelligence of Buddhists, calling them 'dumb' and 'atheist'. The original poster claimed Buddhism led to 'cuckery' and made many North Indians vegan and 'subhuman'.

Anon responded that Buddhism emerged from one person, 'vegcucked' the subcontinent, and was later adopted by non-Indians as a better religion.

Another anon noted that actual Buddhist scholars do not recognise Ambedkarite Buddhism as legitimate, calling it a political ideology with Buddhist flavour.

Other anons discussed the relationship between Buddhism and Hinduism, with one saying Buddhism operates like parasitism and relies on moral high ground. Some anons also made derogatory comments about Buddhists and low-caste individuals.

articles.title: Indians on Pakistan's Existence
articles.body:
Anon claimed that if Pakistan vanishes, Indian patriotic zeal will plummet. Anon responded that Indians do not obsess over Pakistan and have better things to do. Another Anon disagreed, stating that coexistence with Pakistan's Islam is not possible.

Anon also mentioned that low castes are a problem, with one saying they should be kept away from the army and bureaucracy.

Anon noted Pakistan's military capabilities, and another Anon discussed the treatment of low castes in Pakistan and India.
